- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
  Python FastAPI backend monorepo using pyenv, pip, and venv, with no frontend tooling.

- [x] Scaffold the Project
  Created a monorepo layout with apps/, common/python/, docs/, scripts/, root setup files, and a sample FastAPI service.

- [x] Customize the Project
  Added sample FastAPI services, shared configuration and logging utilities, a bootstrap script, and workspace-specific README guidance.

- [x] Install Required Extensions
  No extensions needed.

- [x] Compile the Project
  Created the local virtual environment, installed dependencies, and ran tests successfully.

- [x] Create and Run Task
  Added and ran a VS Code task for the sample FastAPI service using uvicorn.

- [x] Launch the Project
  Debug launch was not configured; the sample FastAPI service was started through a VS Code task instead.

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
  Confirmed README.md and this file reflect the validated project state.

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
